THEACOLIGHTRELICS-BROKEN_LANTERN.title: Broken Lantern
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-BROKEN_LANTERN.descrip: Start each combat with an additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}. At the start of your 2nd turn, lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-DARK_BLADE.title: Dark Blade
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-DARK_BLADE.description: At the end of your turn, deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage to a random enemy if you played no Attacks and gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] if you played no Skills.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-FORBIDDING_TALISMAN.de: At the start of your [blue]{Turn:diff()}[/blue]nd turn, apply [blue]{Power:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-RAINBOW_IN_A_JAR.title: Rainbow in a Jar
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-RAINBOW_IN_A_JAR.descr: At the start of combat choose one random Attack, Skill, or Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-RAINBOW_IN_A_JAR.selec: Choose a card to put into your hand.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-HAUNTED_SHELL.title: Haunted Shell
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-PINK_CRYSTAL.title: Pink Crystal
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-PINK_CRYSTAL.descripti: Heal [green]{Heal:diff()}[/green] HP upon pickup. If you lose [blue]{Heal:diff()}[/blue] HP or less during a combat, heal the amount lost at the end of combat.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-SHADOWS_WEB.title: Shadow's Web
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-SHADOWS_WEB.descriptio: Whenever you end your turn without playing any Skills, apply [blue]{WeakPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies at the end of your turn.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-TEMPERED_GLASS.title: Tempered Glass
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-TEMPERED_GLASS.descrip: At the end of combat, if you didn't lose HP, start the next combat with [blue]{PlatingPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-ECLIPSE_IN_A_JAR.title: Eclipse in a Jar
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-ECLIPSE_IN_A_JAR.descr: At the start of combat put all curses from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-NIGHT_FEATHER.title: Night Feather
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-NIGHT_FEATHER.descript: Enchant up to [blue]{Cards:diff()}[/blue] cards in your deck with Swift [blue]X[/blue] where [blue]X[/blue] is the card’s cost when enchanted.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-NIGHT_FEATHER.selectio: Choose up to two cards to enchant.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-DREAM_ICHOR.title: Dream Ichor
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-DREAM_ICHOR.descriptio: You may choose one card in your [gold]Deck[/gold] to Enchant with Amalgamate {Amalgamate:diff()}.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-ENCHANTING_VEIL.title: Enchanting Veil
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-ENCHANTING_VEIL.descri: If you have energy remaining at the end of your turn, play a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] with a cost equal to lower than your energy.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-HOLY_FLAME.title: Holy Flame
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-HOLY_FLAME.description: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage to a random enemy then increase this amount by [blue]{Increase:diff()}[/blue].
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-LIGHT_BULB.title: Light Bulb
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-LIGHT_BULB.description: If you end your turn with remaining energy, you can retain that many cards.
